Table of Contents

Interface ISeamlineTaskInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control information defining a seamline task.

[Guid("528269BF-E314-4FC5-ADCC-2D6DBB812411")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISeamlineTaskInfo

Properties

CellSize

The cell size at which seamlines are computed.

IPoint CellSize { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

DifferenceRaster

The difference raster built using the selected item raster and the accumulated mosaic raster.

IRaster DifferenceRaster { get; set; }

Property Value

IRaster

Examples

Sample Snippet

EndPoint

The recommended end point for the creation of the seamline.

IPoint EndPoint { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

ItemGeometry

The footprint geometry of the item for which the seamline is being computed.

IGeometry ItemGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

ItemID

The object ID of the item for which the seamline is being computed.

int ItemID { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MosaicFunction

The mosaic function associated with the mosaic dataset.

IMosaicFunction MosaicFunction { get; set; }

Property Value

IMosaicFunction

Examples

Sample Snippet

MosaicGeometry

The geometry of the mosaic built using all items that appear below the selected item.

IGeometry MosaicGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

MosaicItemIDs

The object IDs of all items that appear below the selected item.

IFIDSet MosaicItemIDs { get; set; }

Property Value

IFIDSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

RequestSize

The request size.

int RequestSize { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartPoint

The recommended start point for the creation of the seamline.

IPoint StartPoint { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint
